_metadata.purpose: City-level data extension for countries added after the initial cities_p1 dataset
_metadata.confidence_note: Operational patterns are reliable. Hospital and mortuary names should be verified periodically.

cities.name: Mexico City
cities.relevance: Capital and key documentation hub for repatriation cases in Mexico.
cities.british_presence: High tourist and business presence with regular consular cases.

mortuaries_forensic.name: Instituto de Servicios Periciales (CDMX)
mortuaries_forensic.notes: Forensic authority for non-natural deaths. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: International funeral directors are available in Mexico City. English-speaking support can be arranged. VERIFY providers.
cities.transport_to_hub: Mexico City is the primary cargo hub for UK-bound repatriation from Mexico.
cities.content_angle: Main federal processing city with broad cargo options.

cities.name: Cancun
cities.relevance: High-volume tourist corridor with frequent UK family support needs.
cities.british_presence: Very high seasonal tourist flow from the UK.

hospitals.name: Hospiten Cancun
hospitals.notes: Common private provider for international visitors. VERIFY

cities.local_funeral_directors: Tourism-focused operators can coordinate with Mexico City cargo handlers for repatriation. VERIFY providers.
local_challenges: Coordination between local and federal offices
cities.transport_to_hub: Many cases can depart from CUN directly; some route via Mexico City depending on airline cargo availability.
cities.content_angle: Tourist-case logistics and fast family communication are central in Cancun cases.

cities.name: Manila
